title: Create 6-ified CEI Disenchanter
description: Gives the CEI disenchanter a much-needed texture update to match Create 6’s shiny new copper style. Because consistency matters, and the old texture wasn’t cutting it.
body:
> "Ah yes, the classic CEI disenchanter block. Loved by many, textured by... someone in 2022 and never looked at again."

If you're playing **Create 6** on **Minecraft 1.20.1** and noticed that *everything* got a shiny new copper look,   
except for that one stubborn disenchanter sitting in the corner with its outdated aesthetic, this pack is for you.

## 🔧 What it does
- Updates the disenchanter from Create Enchantment Industry to match the sleek, shiny copper style of Create 6.
- Nothing more, nothing less. Just good textures and some dignity restored.

---

> 💬 *"Because visual cohesion matters. To me. Personally."*  
> 💬 *"Still waiting for the devs to notice us 1.20.1 players. Until then, here’s this."*
